iterations.notes: Child commit 1e37f305 merged to main as f75e595d. Instrumentation source compiled, but live adb device execution was unavailable in the child worktree environment.
Child sandbox could not write worktree git index; no remediation commit created.
Required cleanup is present unstaged in worktree. Hook-enabled commit fails because CoreSimulatorService is unavailable and ios-typecheck/xcodebuild exits before compile.
Wrapper-backed build and targeted LSButtonTests passed from the existing worktree. Environment block cleared; task returned to normal remediation flow.
Commit 70587687 fixed token mapping and removed out-of-scope remediation drift, but reviewer rejected the icon slot because LSButton still bypassed or hid LSIcon-backed rendering.

Commit 4f07ed7a routes button icons through LSIcon with a minimal resolved-color override and removes the hidden/custom icon fallback. Reviewer confirms the icon regression is fixed, but still blocks on missing hover/focus state coverage and disabled opacity token application.

Commit fb918572 completed the hover/focus/disabled-opacity remediation, then host commit 212cea1d restricted LSButton.dispatch to internal visibility. Iteration 007 passed the corrected selector -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSButtonTests and was merged to main as ed78fd69 under the sprint's relaxed testing standard.
Host-validated including emulator instrumentation and release APK gate, checkpointed as 719cdaf5, reviewer approved with low-severity legacy-duplication note, cherry-picked to main as a4f2180b.

warnings: Outcome/AC drift detected: missing explicit state coverage for disabled

iterations.notes: Child commit 45863637 was not merged. It edited tokens/platforms/kotlin despite writeProhibited scope and replaced the initials path with raw Text styling instead of LSText.

Repaired directly on main as 7f005be9. Kept avatar sizing shim local to AvatarSize.kt, restored LSText-based initials, and passed compile/test/release verification. Follow-up mainline cleanup restored a passing :app:lintDebug after declaring ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE and fixing unrelated pre-existing Compose/runtime lint blockers.

Runtime theme-color remediation and GlassPanel backdrop-blur follow-up landed as task worktree commits c083abaf, b57bdebf, and 0723269d, then were cherry-picked to main as 275fedd5, 1a25cac0, and a75922cf after targeted unit, compile, lint, release, and connected instrumentation validation.
